name: C-20 --controls-consulted records the comma-separated list of cited control ids in the trace per the §2.18 schema
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --controls-consulted 'CC1.1,CC2.3' --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'CC1.1' trace.json && grep -q 'CC2.3' trace.json && echo recorded 1>&2
